summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PC Efficiency Manager app. All core features working excellently including real-time system monitoring, AI recommendations using GPT-5.2, process management, and task scheduling.

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1, but charts render correctly

passed_tests: Backend API endpoints (13/13 tests passed - 100% success rate)
Real-time system metrics display (CPU, RAM, Disk, Network, Temperature)
System Health Score widget with breakdown
Process List with CPU/Memory usage display
AI Recommendations using GPT-5.2 - generates 4 specific recommendations
Tab navigation between Overview, Processes, and Scheduler
Real-time data updates (metrics change between refreshes)
Dark Control Room theme and visual design
Responsive layout and proper color coding
